4
MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
About this book
This book does not have the pretension to be a reference text
on Tung’s Acupuncture, since it’s content is based on my own
studies and very basic understanding of the system.
Very few practitioners know Tung’s acupuncture in Brazil and
since I had my first contact with it, about a year ago, it has really
impressed me.
This book is being published in english first, since the english
speaking community is much more active and numerous
than the portuguese speaking community, and this way, a
lot of people, much more experienced than me, can help a
lot this ongoing project. Soon after this book is published in
english, it will be translated into portuguese. My ultimate goal
is to humbly contribute to the community and help propagate
Tung’s acupuncture in Brazil.
These “Top 30” points were not randomly chosen. I’ve used
some of them in my daily practice and also, as a matter of fact,
all 30 points are based on an online seminar by Dr. Chuan-Min
Wang, who was a direct disciple of Master Tung.
There are many, many other great points in Tung’s Acupunture,
but I had to narrow them down to only 30. My next project will
be a Top 50 or Top 60 Tung’s points book.
This book is free. This way, I hope I can help motivate people
to start learning and using the system.
Everyone can download, share, copy and redistribute the
material in any medium or format.. It has no copyrighted

MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
About me
“Like most things,
I am nothing.
Like most people,
I know nothing”.
8
MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
不闻不若闻之，
闻之不若见之，
见之不若知之，
知之不若行之；
学至于行之而止矣。
BÙ WÉN BÙ RUÒ WÉN ZHĪ,
WÉN ZHĪ BÙ RUÒ JIÀN ZHĪ,
JIÀN ZHĪ BÙ RUÒ ZHĪZHĪ,
ZHĪZHĪ BÙ RUÒ XÍNG ZHĪ;
XUÉ ZHÌYÚ XÍNG ZHĪ ÉR ZHǏ YǏ.
– KǑNG FŪ ZǏ.
– 孔夫子。
9
MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
“Not having heard is not as good as having heard,
having heard is not as good as having seen,
having seen is not as good as knowing,
knowing is not as good as putting into action;
True learning is complete only when action has been put forth”.
– Confucius.

11
MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
LÌ GĀN JIÀN YǏNG (立竿見影) is an expression that was used
very often by Dr. Richard Teh-Fu Tan and is very appropriate
in Tung’s Acupuncture as well. It can be translated as “Stand a
pole under the Sun and immediately see its shadow”. In other
words, “Immediate results”. That’s how acupuncture should
work, that’s how Dr. Tan’s Balance Method works and that’s
how Tung’s Acupuncture also works!

Master
Tung
董
14
MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
Who was Master Tung?
Master Tung Ching–Chang (董景昌大師, DǑNG JǏNG CHĀNG DÀSHĪ)
was born in 1915 in the Shandong (山東, SHĀNDŌNG) Province
in Northern China. The Tung’s family orthodox acupuncture is
based on many generations of Tung’s family teachings.
Tung’s Acupuncture was a secret tradition, exclusively passed
down within the family. Master Tung Ching-Chang broke this
tradition and accepted his first disciple outside the family over
50 years ago.
There are over 400 Tung’s unique acupuncture points
distributed mostly on the extremities of the body. Tung’s
acupuncture is well known for it’s unique set of points, being
a complete system that includes its own channels, unique
points, diagnostic methods and needling techniques. Tung’s
15
MASTER TUNG ACUPUNCTURE – TOP 30 MASTER TUNG POINTS
Tung or
Dong?
acupuncture is based on a five zang (and six fu) channel
system that is unique to it, and different from the traditional 14
channels of acupuncture.
And also, Tung’s acupuncture is a complete acupuncture
tradition that predates the traditional 14 channels system. The
origin and principle of each of Master Tung’s points follow the
law of the five elements (五行五行, WǓ​ XÍNG) and the five zang (五
脏, WǓ​ ZÀNG) channels. Each point has its own pathway which
directly connects to the five zang (and six fu).
Master Tung is sometimes
called Master Dong. The
reason for this is that Master
Tung originally took the
Wade-Giles romanization
system of his surname “董”
before the pinyin (拼音, PĪNYĪN)
sy
